name: [smoke] renders all aspect ratios without crashing
[smoke] renders with fallback ReactNode without crashing
[smoke] renders with explicit width and height
[fn] non-interactive → renders as View with role="image"
[fn] interactive=true + onPress → renders as Pressable with role="button"
[fn] interactive=true + onClick → renders as Pressable with role="button"
[fn] interactive=false → renders as View (role="image") even with onPress
[fn] disabled=true beats interactive=true → renders as View (role="image")
[fn] testID forwarded to the root element
[fn] onPress fires when interactive image is pressed
[fn] onClick fires when onPress not set (alias)
[fn] multiple presses fire onPress each time
[fn] onError prop accepted — wired to internal error handler
[fn] non-interactive image does not have an onPress handler
[fn] aspectRatio="auto" → no aspectRatio in container style
[fn] default aspectRatio is "auto" → no aspectRatio in style
[fn] all aspect ratios produce a positive numeric ratio
[fn] numeric width applied to container style
[fn] numeric height applied to container style
[a11y] getByLabelText finds image by alt text
[a11y] getByLabelText finds interactive image by aria-label
[a11y] inner RNImage has accessible=false (container carries a11y)
[a11y] disabled does NOT affect accessibility role (still image)
[a11y] disabled interactive → role="image" (not button — disabled beats interactive)
[bug] BUG-IMG-1: onClick silently ignored when onPress is also provided
[bug] BUG-IMG-2: interactive=true without handler → role="button" on non-pressable View
[bug] BUG-IMG-3: Figma fit="container" (correct Figma value) not in native — naming mismatch
[bug] BUG-IMG-4: objectPosition accepted but never affects rendering (NO-OP)
[bug] BUG-IMG-5: loading="lazy" accepted but has no effect on native (always eager)
